behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction mentions DefaultLossConfig, dppo_mask_low/high, ipo_mask_low/high removal, is_masked metric, default_loss_fn, and advantage-sign gating behavior — all key test assertions are covered.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and expected behavior without showing specific code changes or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior via is_masked metric values and field presence/absence, not specific variable names or internal helpers; alternative implementations using torch.where or conditional logic would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import modules, instantiate configs, call default_loss_fn, and check numerical is_masked values.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify specific is_masked numerical outcomes based on advantage signs — a stub returning defaults couldn't satisfy both positive-adv-ignores-low and negative-adv-ignores-high tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover field renaming, old field removal, and advantage-conditioned masking behavior as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with clear section comments (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) and descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: Paths, field names, and commands are consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names DefaultLossConfig and default_loss_fn which is appropriate scope; does not cite specific line numbers.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not agentmd config edits.
